checks.name: windows-cmd-shell-quoting
checks.detail: Resolved Windows .cmd/.bat paths are now quoted before shell execution, so spaced shim paths do not break readiness version/smoke runs.

checks.name: windows-path-casing-regressions
checks.detail: Runtime readiness tests pass for Path, lowercase path/pathext, and duplicate PATH/Path plus PATHEXT/pathext scenarios with a .cmd shim under a spaced directory.

checks.name: missing-command-behavior
checks.detail: True missing-command detection remains intact and still reports the actionable Codex PATH guidance.
